column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Taymyr vegetation plots (published)
Dataset Author: Elena and Igor Pospelov
Dataset Table: Species cover data for Taymyr dataset (published)

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the Drude cover-abundance scale. Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
